title: Landscaping and Groundskeeping Workers
description: Landscape or maintain grounds of property using hand or power tools or equipment. Workers typically perform a variety of tasks, which may include any combination of the following: sod laying, mowing, trimming, planting, watering, fertilizing, digging, raking, sprinkler installation, and installation of mortarless segmental concrete masonry wall units.

tasks.text: Gather and remove litter.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use hand tools, such as shovels, rakes, pruning saws, saws, hedge or brush trimmers, or axes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate vehicles or powered equipment, such as mowers, tractors, twin-axle vehicles, snow blowers, chainsaws, electric clippers, sod cutters, or pruning saws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Water lawns, trees, or plants, using portable sprinkler systems, hoses, or watering cans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prune or trim trees, shrubs, or hedges, using shears, pruners, or chain saws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix and spray or spread fertilizers, herbicides, or insecticides onto grass, shrubs, or trees, using hand or automatic sprayers or spreaders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Care for established lawns by mulching, aerating, weeding, grubbing, removing thatch, or trimming or edging around flower beds, walks, or walls.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Follow planned landscaping designs to determine where to lay sod, sow grass, or plant flowers or foliage.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Trim or pick flowers and clean flower beds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach wires from planted trees to support stakes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plant seeds, bulbs, foliage, flowering plants, grass, ground covers, trees, or shrubs, and apply mulch for protection, using gardening tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mow or edge lawns, using power mowers or edgers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rake, mulch, and compost leaves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Decorate gardens with stones or plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use irrigation methods to adjust the amount of water consumption and to prevent waste.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide proper upkeep of sidewalks, driveways, parking lots, fountains, planters, burial sites, or other grounds features.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Shovel snow from walks, driveways, or parking lots, and spread salt in those areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain irrigation systems, including winterizing the systems and starting them up in spring.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or cultivate lawns or gardens.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain or repair tools, equipment, or structures, such as buildings, greenhouses, fences, or benches, using hand or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Care for artificial turf fields, periodically removing the turf and replacing cushioning pads or vacuuming and disinfecting the turf after use to prevent the growth of harmful bacteria.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install rock gardens, ponds, decks, drainage systems, irrigation systems, retaining walls, fences, planters, or playground equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Care for natural turf fields, making sure the underlying soil has the required composition to allow proper drainage and to support the grasses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise customers on plant selection or care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Haul or spread topsoil, or spread straw over seeded soil to hold soil in place.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Build forms and mix and pour cement to form garden borders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
